preregistration.belief_construction: trailing 21d block -> train-frozen PCA-8 -> train-fit GMM-2 posterior

POST_REVIEW.corrected_verdict: KT-C HOLD-BAR PASS, OOS-DEGRADING SUBSTITUTE - L2 oos twin z -1.12..-1.27 vs HMM +0.95..+1.13 (stable ~2.2z gap on 2.5y fresh data); pass margin over the bar is thin (0.00-0.24 across bootstrap variants) - PROVISIONAL
corrections: claim "certified rule" inaccurate: derive_and_read re-derives configs per belief (HMM arm lands 0.74/0.95, not the deployed 0.66/0.74); comparison internally fair; both arms at grid edges (twin z = lower bounds)

L2 blunt read: R2=0.63 vs the HMM belief, 89.2% decision agreement - largely a noisy re-encode of the HMM decision + vol; the ~11% disagreement days are where the OOS collapse lives; independent content is small and OOS-degrading
W3 guidance: do NOT build memory work on L2-as-substitute; improve or discard L2 first
